stories.title: Mistral AI Releases Large 3 as Open-Weights Model
stories.summary: Mistral AI has open-sourced Mistral Large 3, a 70-billion parameter model that rivals GPT-4o on several benchmarks while being fully available for commercial self-hosting. The release is accompanied by an Apache 2.0 licence, making it one of the most permissively licensed frontier-class models to date.
stories.shareText: Mistral AI open-sourced Large 3 (70B) under Apache 2.0 — frontier-class performance, fully self-hostable. Open AI just got a whole lot more capable. 🔓 #AI #OpenSource #Mistral

stories.title: NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra Cuts LLM Inference Costs by 60% in Benchmarks
stories.summary: NVIDIA's Blackwell Ultra GPU architecture, now shipping to cloud providers, is demonstrating a 60% reduction in per-token inference cost for large language models compared to H100 clusters. Early adopters at major cloud providers report the savings are enabling new use cases that were previously cost-prohibitive.
stories.shareText: NVIDIA's Blackwell Ultra is cutting LLM inference costs by 60% vs H100s. Cheaper inference = AI in places that couldn't afford it before. ⚡ #AI #NVIDIA #Inference
